title: | Parcool Refurbishment |
description: A Refurbishment Textures for Parcool Mod by Alex_ru
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/172fba5b7bd346701ec2d9b126081c415957ff05.png)
# |Parcool Refurbishment|
**Introduction:**
This is a resource pack that aims to refurbish Parcool Mod's Textures by Alex_ru.

Parcool is a Mod created by Alex_ru that allows players to perform adventurous and flexible parkour moves, giving players more options to cross terrain or perform cool acrobatics. Everything is perfect, but it seems that the appearance of the Stamina bars is a bit out of place, so I made this pack with the hope that the Mod has a style more suitable for Vanilla, easier to look at. At the same time, I've revamped a bit what is available in the mod so everything is more harmonious when used with the Modpacks environment.

**Features:**

- New look for Parkour guidebooks that present the Mod's Logo.

- Enhance the appearance of the Stamina Bar ( Light) and Stamina Hub ( Normal ) so using the normal one was not a bad choice at all.

- Refresh a bit for the "Inexhaustable" effect icon.

**Dependencies:**

This Resource Pack requires Parcool to work properly ( obviously )

Download it here:
[https://modrinth.com/mod/parcool](https://modrinth.com/mod/parcool)/
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/parcool](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/parcool)

**Notice:**

I'm not the one who is making Parcool, please support the original owner Alex_ru.

**Usage:**

**Allowed:**

You're allowed to use this pack in personal or public Modpack but please make sure to credit me or leave the link to the download site.
Feel free to make a video review about it or include it, be grateful if there is credit.
**Not Allowed:**

You cannot change or take any assets from the pack without permission.
Don't claim at your creation.
Reposting or commercial use is strictly prohibited.
!Older versions are supported, ignore the warning!

If you love it and want to see more products like this, you can help us by becoming a member.

I hope you like it, feel free to make suggestions.
